role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund invests in financial instruments that ProShare Advisors believes, in combination, should produce daily returns consistent with the Daily Target. Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of the fund’s assets in, or provide exposure to, financial instruments that ProShare Advisors believes, in combination, should produce daily returns consistent with the Daily Target.
